hero.job-subtitle: Digital engineering graduate focused on game development, software engineering, and web development.

profile.column-1-head: Comfortable across a broad range of technologies

portfolio.description: This portfolio highlights a selection of projects I completed alone or in teams during my digital engineering studies at Télécom SudParis. You will find mostly game development work, along with web and software projects.

about.p1: My name is Adrien Schroedel. I am a software and game developer trained at Télécom SudParis, and I have contributed to many <portfolioLink>game development projects</portfolioLink> in both academic and personal settings.
about.p2: I enjoy environments where technical rigor, collaboration, and product thinking move together. I work on gameplay systems, production tools, and team workflows with a strong focus on quality.
about.p3: My goal is to join a high-standard team with clear values and a collaborative mindset to build digital experiences that are useful, reliable, and memorable.

contact.subtitle:
Have a project in mind in web, software engineering, or game development?
Let's talk. I would be glad to hear about it.
